intro:
There is limited information available on the plant Ptarmica erba-rotta. However, I found that Ptarmica is another name for the plant  Inula helenium, which is commonly known as Elf Dock or Wild Sunflower. 

Ptarmica, or Inula helenium, is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, primarily used for its anti-inflammatory and digestive benefits. The health benefits of Ptarmica include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Ptarmica include sesquiterpenes, inulin, and flavonoids. The most common herbal preparations made with Ptarmica include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
